texto: Given that the Taliban is a Pashtun movement, the tendency of the Pashtun man to emphasize his individuality through disagreement rather than agreement will come to the fore after the disappearance of the already 'loose' authority of Mullah Omar.
explicacao: Citação de Khaled Ahmed sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Given that the Taliban is a Pashtun movement, the tendency of the Pashtun man to emphasize his in…” articula reflexao, individuality, pashtun em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e pashtun.
